name: CachyOS
tagline: Arch Linux with CPU-optimised packages and a fast kernel
description: CachyOS is an Arch-based distribution that ships pre-compiled packages optimised for modern CPU microarchitectures (x86-64-v3, x86-64-v4, znver4), meaning you get native-speed binaries without the compilation overhead of Gentoo. It uses the BORE (Burst-Oriented Response Enhancer) scheduler and the CachyOS kernel patchset for lower latency and better gaming frame pacing. A GUI installer, multiple desktop flavours, and a curated selection of performance tweaks make it the fastest and most polished Arch-derivative on DistroWatch's 2025 rankings.
